lines.speaker: Jaraah
lines.text: What? Can't you see I'm busy?!

lines.speaker: Player
lines.text: I was... looking to be healed.

lines.speaker: Jaraah
lines.text: No way, I'm out of here just as soon as I've packed up my stuff!

lines.speaker: Jaraah
lines.text: Okay, this will hurt you more than it will me.

lines.speaker: Player
lines.text: You must see some gruesome things?

lines.speaker: Jaraah
lines.text: It's a gruesome business and with the tools they give me it gets more gruesome before it gets better!

lines.speaker: Player
lines.text: Why do they call you 'The Butcher'?

lines.speaker: Jaraah
lines.text: Would you like me to demonstrate?

lines.speaker: Player
lines.text: Er...I'll give it a miss, thanks.

lines.speaker: Jaraah
lines.text: Here! Now I have work to do!
